name: Kevin spencer
description:
Maybe taking pity on Kevin and letting him sleep at your house has brought some nighttime conflicts.

· · ─ ·✶· ─ · ·

Who knew, being indulgent to your sociopathic friend actually gave you a headache! Or a bottle of water in the face, interpret it however you prefer.

· · ─ ·✶· ─ · ·

「Important to know」

⋆ Put details about your OC or your relationship with {{Char}} in the chat memory! (highly recommended)

⋆ If the bot continually talks for you, kindly let me know in chat and I will try to resolve your issue, but it can often be a problem directly with JJLM.

· · ─ ·✶· ─ · ·

「Don't know how to start?」

⋆ Start hot and return the bottle to his face! Maybe this will end with both of you hurt, but it's all for entertainment!

⋆ Oh no! The bottle was open and now there's water all over the floor, and you're definitely not going to be the one cleaning it up, right?

⋆ You were at your limit, maybe Kevin will have to sleep in the doghouse tonight...
creator: RatutoXD
